descs.desc:
Targets the rearmost unit (In regular encounters)

[BeforeAttack] Spend [Charge] Count to deal more damage (Max 50%)
coinDescs: [OnSucceedAttack] Deal bonus Pride damage by (Target’s [Burst] x 7.5)% of the damage dealt, and reduce [Burst] Count by 5 (Max 75%)

descs.desc:
Targets the rearmost unit (In regular encounters)

[BeforeAttack] Spend [Charge] Count to deal more damage (Max 75%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If [Charge] Count was spent, inflict 3 [DimensionRift]
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal bonus Pride damage by (Target’s [Burst] x 10)% of the damage dealt, and reduce [Burst] Count by 5 (Max 100%)

descs.desc:
[CantIdentify]
Targets a random unit

[BeforeAttack] Spend [Charge] Count to deal more damage (Max 50%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 3 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal bonus Pride damage by (Target’s [Burst] x 7.5)% of the damage dealt, and reduce [Burst] Count by 5 (Max 75%)

[CantIdentify]

[BeforeAttack] Spend [Charge] Count to deal more damage (Max 75%)
coinDescs:
[OnSucceedAttack] If [Charge] Count was spent, inflict 3 [DimensionRift]
[OnSucceedAttack] Inflict 6 [Burst]
[OnSucceedAttack] Deal bonus Pride damage by (Target’s [Burst] x 10)% of the damage dealt, and reduce [Burst] Count by 5 (Max 100%)

2010411.name: Rambling Man
2010411.desc:
At the start of the turn, if this unit took no damage last turn, gain +4 [Charge] Count.
After successfully hitting an enemy with lower Speed, inflict +1 [Burst] Count. (3 times per turn)
